headline: Verizon Communications (VZ) Price Target Bumped to $55
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 15 Large Cap Stocks with Highest Dividends. Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) engages in the provision of communications, technology, information, and streaming products and services to consumers, businesses, and governmental entities worldwide. headline: Verizon Communications (VZ) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Returns And Cost Efficiency Focus
summary: Verizon Communications: Recent Returns and Business Mix Verizon Communications (VZ) has delivered mixed share price moves recently, with a 0.8% decline over the past day, a 0.5% decline over the past week, and modest gains over the past month. Looking out over longer periods, the stock shows a 24.1% year to date total return and an 18.5% total return over the past year, alongside reported 3 year and 5 year total returns of 57.2% and 16.1% respectively.
